subject: Action needed: koi planning in Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q2 review | INIT-4945
body: Here is a progress summary for the koi plan in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Validate staffing, budget assumptions, and handoff checkpoints. Comparative note includes Albert Einstein and Katherine Johnson as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-4945. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: risk, risk.
